summary.DimensionTooltipContent: Switch tabs to explore parallel layouts per dimension
summary.DPDimensionTooltip: Collapse TP, PP, and CP details
summary.TPDimensionTooltip: Expand all dimensions for complete cluster analysis
Computation/CommunicationDescribe: Computing = Sum of kernel time on NPU
Total Time = Computing(Not Overlapped) + Computing_Communication Overlapped + Communication(Not Overlapped) + Free
Total Computing Ratio = Computing / Total Time
Communication Ratio = Communication(Not Overlapped) / Total Time
Computation/CommunicationDescribeWithPre: Total Computing = Sum of kernel time on NPU
Total Time = Preparing + Computing(Not Overlapped) + Computing_Communication Overlapped + Communication(Not Overlapped) + Free
Total Computing Ratio = Computing / Total Time
Communication Ratio = Communication(Not Overlapped) / Total Time
summary.Computation/CommunicationLastDescribe: Click Bar Chart Display The Single Rank Computation / Communication Detail
summary.Name: Name
summary.Communication(Not Overlapped and Exclude: Communication(Not Overlapped and Exclude Receive Ops)
summary.Max Computing + Communication(Not Overla: Max Total Time(Computing + Communication(Not Overlapped) + Free)
summary.Min Computing + Communication(Not Overla: Min Total Time(Computing + Communication(Not Overlapped) + Free)
summary.Computing + Communication(Not Overlapped: Total Time(Computing + Communication(Not Overlapped) + Free) Range
summary.SummaryAdvice: {{type}} has some issues in the cluster, because the max difference of {{type}} time has reached {{time}}μs.
StageTimeAndBubbleTimeDescribe: Stage Time: Time excluding the portion consumed by the receive operator under pipeline parallelism
Bubble Time: Total time consumed by the receive operator
summary.ProhibitConfiguration: The data collected by the system cannot be manually configured
summary.GenerateConfirm: Are you sure you want to change this configuration, as it is inconsistent with the system's collected configuration?
summary.NoDataTip: The original collected data doesn't contain the parallelism strategy configuration parameters. Please configure the parameters
